channel.title: Music-Player on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Music-Player on Arrans github.io

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: tranxuanthang/lrcget
item.description: Utility for mass-downloading LRC synced lyrics for your offline music library.

item.title: suitux/Tagr
item.description: Self-hosted web app for browsing, playing, and editing music file metadata. Features a three-panel UI to navigate your library, listen to tracks, and write tag changes directly back to audio files. Built with Next.js, React, Prisma + SQLite, and node-taglib-sharp.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, MacOs and maybe soon Android
